name: schnapp-os-core
description: schnapp-os core: session-hygiene & surface-check skills, domain skills, agents, commands, and composable rules. Components auto-discover from this plugin root. Hooks (SessionStart freshness/git gate, Stop push-gate, SessionEnd backup) are wired in the repo .claude/settings.json against live paths, NOT delivered via this plugin — hooks.json is intentionally empty (decision 0011 #2, superseding 0005).
